title: Almond Macaroons Recipe
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"d924p","text":"This is one of the EASIEST deserts to make.  It takes almost no time, bakes quickly, and has no butter, wheat flour, or egg yolk.  It is also infinitely flexible - add Khalua instead of vanilla, make them chocolaty with a quarter cup of cacao, place an almond inside each one, or substitute almond with shredded coconut (partially or completely).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9h635","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bacdv","text":"This is inspired by Mark Bittman's macaroons recipe. steps: Mix almonds, almond meal, and sugar in a bowl.
Add egg whites and vanilla, and mix thoroughly to make batter.
creator: Lenny Teytelman
